profile.about:
She holds a bachelor's degree in Electronics from Bu-Ali Sina University and pursued her passion for telecommunications through a master's degree at Tarbiat Modares University. Currently, she is a PhD student at Pompeu Fabra University in Barcelona, Spain, where she is working toward her goal of making a meaningful impact in the telecommunications field and contributing to international research and innovation.
Driven by curiosity and a love for learning, she is passionate about research, personal growth, and embracing new challenges. She values collaboration, enjoys connecting with people from diverse backgrounds, and leads an active lifestyle with an interest in sports and well-being.

8mo • Edited • 

I’m happy to share that I’ve obtained a new training certification: Machine Learning & Advanced Statistics: Generative AI Specialization from Universidad Politécnica de Madrid!

A huge thank you to Álvaro Barbero Jiménez, Alberto Suárez, and Carlos María Alaíz Gudín for their outstanding teaching, insightful lectures, and generosity in sharing their expertise. Your passion for the field made this an inspiring and intellectually enriching experience.


#GenerativeAI #MachineLearning

Mina Khadem

 
 • 3rd+

Research Assistant | Wireless communication | LLM  | AI/ML

1yr • Edited • 

🌟 Exciting News! 🌟
I am thrilled to announce that our latest research, titled "Dynamic Fairness-Aware Spectrum Auction for Enhanced Licensed Shared Access in UAV-based Networks", has been published in IEEE Transactions on Communications (IF: 7.2).
This work explores innovative methods to tackle spectrum scarcity in 6G networks. We propose a novel framework that not only enhances fairness but also optimizes spectrum utilization for next-generation networks.

🔗 Read the full publication here: https://lnkd.in/dmhBnBnp
A heartfelt thank you to my collaborators and mentors, including Maryam Ansarifard, Nader Mokari, Mohammad Reza Javan, Hamid Saeedi, and Eduard Jorswieck, whose insights and efforts were instrumental in this work. 
I look forward to discussing ideas and receiving your valuable feedback! 🙌


#5G #6G #UAV #SpectrumSharing #Spectrumsensing #ReinforcementLearning #IEEE
